enhancedmovement.config.title: Enhanced Movement Config
enhancedmovement.config.doubleJump.enabl: Enable or disable the double jump entirely.
enhancedmovement.config.doubleJump.jumpB: Strength of the double-jump boost. 40% is about a 4-block boost; higher values jump higher.
enhancedmovement.config.doubleJump.delay: Wait after the initial jump before a double jump is allowed. 250ms is responsive, 500ms more deliberate.
enhancedmovement.config.doubleJump.ledge: Ledge-grab assist when holding jump near an edge, helping you stick the landing (uses 50% boost strength).
enhancedmovement.config.dash.enabled.too: Enable or disable the dash entirely.
enhancedmovement.config.dash.cooldown.to: Time between dashes. 100ms chains dashes, 1000ms is the default, 5000ms is the max.
enhancedmovement.config.dash.useKeybinds: Off = double-tap movement keys; On = hold a direction and press the Dash keybind (great for mouse side buttons).
enhancedmovement.config.dash.airDash.too: Allow dashing while airborne, not just on the ground.
enhancedmovement.config.afterimage.enabl: Show Sandevistan-style afterimages when dashing (visible to nearby players).
enhancedmovement.config.afterimage.image: Number of afterimages along the dash path. 20 is the default, 30 ultra-dense, 6 minimal.
enhancedmovement.config.afterimage.lifet: Base fade time in tens of milliseconds. 120 = 1.2s default, 200 = 2.0s for longer cinematic trails.
enhancedmovement.config.afterimage.prism: Cycle afterimages through rainbow spectrum colors instead of cyan.
enhancedmovement.config.general.sneakDis: Disable all enhanced-movement features while sneaking (same hunger requirement as sprinting).
